# The Comprehensive List of LLM Fine-Tuning Tools

> a curated, source-linked directory of open-source and commercial software for supervised fine-tuning, parameter-efficient training, preference optimization, and post-training large language models. Includes a machine-readable catalog. CC0 licensed. Reviewed monthly; last reviewed 2026-07-16.

Every entry links to a primary source. Availability markers distinguish open source, open weights, open core, commercial products, and public standards/resources. There is no paid placement. This independent directory is maintained by aglio-lab, and every entry follows the same evidence rules.

## Main content

- [Full list](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/aglio-lab/llm-fine-tuning-tools/main/README.md): 155 source-linked entries across 15 catalog sections
- [JSON catalog](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/aglio-lab/llm-fine-tuning-tools/main/data/tools.json): structured entity records
- [CSV catalog](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/aglio-lab/llm-fine-tuning-tools/main/data/tools.csv): flat machine-readable index
- [Monthly maintenance policy](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/aglio-lab/llm-fine-tuning-tools/main/MAINTENANCE.md): review schedule and evidence rules

## Key categories

- End-to-End Fine-Tuning Frameworks and Platforms (12 entries)
- SFT and Core Training Libraries (9 entries)
- PEFT, LoRA, and Adapter Tooling (9 entries)
- Distributed Training and Training Optimization (11 entries)
- RLHF, Preference Optimization, and Reinforcement Learning (12 entries)
- Data Curation, Labeling, and Human Feedback (11 entries)
- Synthetic Data and Data Distillation (10 entries)
- Experiment Tracking and Model Registries (8 entries)
- Hyperparameter Optimization and Orchestration (8 entries)
- Quantization and Compression (13 entries)
- Checkpoint Export, Conversion, and Inference (11 entries)
- Managed Cloud Fine-Tuning Services (15 entries)
- Evaluation and Checkpoint Selection (9 entries)
- Domain-Specific and Multimodal Fine-Tuning (7 entries)

## Citation

- [CITATION.cff](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/aglio-lab/llm-fine-tuning-tools/main/CITATION.cff)
- Cite as: “The Comprehensive List of LLM Fine-Tuning Tools” (2026). GitHub. https://github.com/aglio-lab/llm-fine-tuning-tools
- Cite an individual tool using its own repository, documentation, or paper.
